subcodes.first_line: O Judah! The Mount speaketh, yet the people hear not; the Lote-Tree calleth aloud, yet mankind comprehendeth not. Hearken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یهودا ان الطور یحدث و القوم لایسمعون ان السدره تنادی و الناس لایفقهون اسمع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @proclamation to the people of the world, @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
